quietLiveCapture.reuseMetricNote: The aggregate denominator includes one intentional volatile overlay recording per frame; there were no forced-dirty events or dirty summaries.

exactIsolationCapture.note: Captured while imported textures and output families were still publishing; used only to verify exact dependency isolation.

implementedContracts: Image-view structural identity includes backing image allocation generation, flags, view type, format, component mapping, and complete subresource range
Dormant interned views survive target-slot rotation and retire before their backing image
Mesh and deformation buffer publication compares stable allocation-backed structural identities
External indirect-atlas index buffers are not overwritten by mesh-owned wrappers
Retirement reverse dependencies dirty only exact recorded command-buffer handles and secondary chains
Descriptor generations advance only on dirty-to-published transitions
Exact dirtied, exact chain, unrelated preserved, and global fallback counters are emitted to profiler captures and enforced by the strict harness
followUp: Phase 5.2.2 must classify reusable primary outcomes separately from intentional volatile overlay recordings before its 99% gate is meaningful.
